localizations.title: Ragnarök
localizations.hiddenObject_2: This cave could serve as a shelter, though the frame of this gate is far too complex to be purely aesthetic.
localizations.hiddenObject_3: Your path forward seems to lead you into the dark well.
localizations.hint_61_first: Using the sunstone, you can make out a way through the fog.
localizations.hint_61: Your way forward resembles your casting runes.
localizations.hint_5: The runes are not always clear. Others are probably hidden around you.
localizations.hint_43_first: Use your bow and ax to fight off the Kraken.
localizations.hint_43: Use your weapons on the Kraken's tentacle and eye.
localizations.hint_73: You need fire to light this forge.
localizations.hint_3: Striking with the smith's hammer will create a symbol.
localizations.hint_48: Your weapons will allow you to gather some wood, as well as dislodge the object upon the cliff.
localizations.hint_34: There is a small slit within the gate. You could slip a thin object inside to open it, but you need to find a suitable object first.
localizations.hint_10: The torch can provide light as well as start a fire.
localizations.hint_17_first: When placed in the proper place, this emblem takes on a more mathematical meaning.
localizations.hint_17: Place the emblem on the gate.
localizations.hint_83: Now that the forge is lit, you can forge something.
localizations.hint_86_first: You use the hammer's blows upon the forge to create an item. The blows generate a specific rhythm: 1, 5, 2.
localizations.hint_29: This knife's thin and sharp blade can be used in a way different from its original purpose.
localizations.hint_63_first: This gate has a specific symbol engraved upon it, indicating something that should be placed here.
localizations.hint_63: The frame of the gate hides two numbers, but something is missing to indicate how you should unite them.
localizations.hint_35: It is too dark to move forward safely.
localizations.hint_4_first: Lay down your weapons in the indicated places.
localizations.hint_4: Once your weapons have been placed on the proper spots, two names should appear.
localizations.hint_72: There's a symbol written above the head of each god.
localizations.hint_31_first: Use your sunstone to find your way through Asgard.
localizations.hint_31: Each natural element illuminated as you look through the sunstone corresponds to a rune.
localizations.hint_88: The tree you discovered in the forest will help you find your way.
localizations.hint_99_first: Four words are emphasized by this poem; this is not a coincidence.
localizations.hint_99: A tree with three branches, an arrow, an eye, and a broken table describe the shapes of some of the runes.
localizations.hint_2_first: The forest is more than what it appears to be. The advice you received from Yggdrasil should help you find the right path.
localizations.hint_2: Carefully examine the reflection; there's something different which can help you find another card.
localizations.hint_66_first: The final rune doesn't resemble any of the runes you know. It is yet another illusion, which somewhat resembles the Giant rune.
localizations.hint_66: The final rune is the Giant rune joined with its reflection. The other runes here must also follow this pattern.
localizations.hint_11: You must attack Loki before he can flee, but your mortal weapons will not harm him.
localizations.hint_33: While Loki's illusions have spread throughout Asgard, with his helmet you can see through them, and you will not lose your way again in your search for Odin.
localizations.hint_64_first: Flip your weapons over to use them here.
localizations.hint_64: Placing the weapons that you flipped over in the right places, and tracing the paths of the arrows, will reveal a symbol.
localizations.hint_65_first: Flip your weapons over to use them here.
localizations.hint_65: Placing the weapons that you flipped over in the right places, and tracing the paths of the arrows, will reveal a symbol.
localizations.hint_74_first: Use the sunstone to locate Surt within his army.
localizations.hint_74: You must combine the blue spear and the rider of the correct color.
localizations.hint_45_first: The three elements needed for the ritual are Yggdrasil, Loki's helmet, and Surt's shield.
localizations.hint_45: Each of the ritual's items conceals a rune.
localizations.hint_55: Using the map, follow the voyage of the first Viking to trace the first rune.
localizations.hint_87_first: The remains of the Silver Serpent's molting can be found within your discards.
localizations.hint_87: The knots found on the Serpent belong in a certain order. The numbers on the cards can help you determine that order.
localizations.hint_59: By fully reconstructing the Gold Serpent, the third rune will appear in the forest.
localizations.hint_machine_72_first: You must accept the inevitable; it would be impossible to have gone through the events you have faced unharmed. Say what happened to you out loud.
localizations.hint_machine_72: If you have drowned in the icy sea, you are no longer alive.
localizations.hint_machine_55_part1: Follow the voyage of the first Viking to trace the rune.
localizations.hint_machine_55_part2_first: You have already seen the remains of Jorgamund's molting throughout your voyage.
localizations.hint_machine_55_part2: Each of the Serpent's knots correspond to a specific number, which will help you find the correct order.
localizations.hint_machine_55_part3: By fully reconstructing the Gold Serpent, the third rune will appear in the forest.
localizations.hint_machine_55_part4: Loki is probably hiding among the cards you have not yet revealed.
localizations.answer_hint_61: By looking at the sea (61) through the sunstone (47), you will see a group of runes (5) that you must use. Activate the Ice, Combat, Creation, and Destiny runes.
localizations.answer_hint_5: By looking at the sea (61) through the sunstone (47), you will see a group of runes (5) that you must use. Activate the Ice, Combat, Creation, and Destiny runes.
localizations.answer_hint_43: By placing the ax vertically next to the tentacle, you will form the number 91. By placing the bow vertically, aiming at the monster's eye, you will form the number 78.
localizations.answer_hint_73: Use the torch (10) to light the forge (73). 10 + 73 = 83
localizations.answer_hint_48: By placing the ax over the wood, you will form the letter M.  By placing the bow near the cliff and pointing it at the light, you will form the number 17.
localizations.answer_hint_17: You can use your bow near the dead forest (48) to retrieve a metal emblem (17). Place the emblem on top of the gate (63). This will form the expression"5x7".
localizations.answer_hint_34: Inserting the knife (29) which you created in the forge (86) will cause the gate (34) to open. 29 + 34 = 63.
localizations.answer_hint_63: You can use your bow near the dead forest (48) to retrieve a metal emblem (17). Place the emblem on top of the gate (63). This will form the expression "5x7".
localizations.answer_hint_83: Use the hammer (3) on the anvil in the forge (83). 83 + 3 = 86.
localizations.answer_hint_86: The blows of the hammer (3) cause sounds to echo in certain patterns: 1 sound for rune ice, 5 sounds for rune destiny, and 2 sounds for rune fire. To finalize the ritual of forging, you must add rune creation.
localizations.answer_hint_29: Insert the knife (29) into the stone gate's slot (34). 29 + 34 = 63.
localizations.answer_hint_35: The torch (10) dispels the darkness within the well (hidden +62). 10 + 62 = 72
localizations.answer_hint_4: Using the scratches in the wood floor (4) as guides, place the ax in the top left, and the bow in the top right, to form the word LOKI. Place the shield in the bottom center to form the word ODIN.  Look at the scroll (72) to find the symbols associated with these gods, and find the numerals 3 and 1: 31.
localizations.answer_hint_31: After using your sunstone (47) to look over Valhalla (Y and Z), you'll find the following elements illuminated, from nearest to farthest: Water, Fire, Ice, and Wood. Activate the associated runes in that order to proceed.
localizations.answer_hint_99: The poem emphasizes the words tree, arrow, eye, and table; these words describe the shape of the Wood, Combat, Creation, and Horse runes, respectively. Activate these runes in that order.
localizations.answer_hint_2: By rotating the forest (88) 180 degrees, the 99 next to the path becomes 66.
localizations.answer_hint_66: The runes etched in the stone next to Loke are, in fact, runes mirrored by his illusion. By looking at the left half of each of these etchings, you will see the Fire, Water, Sun, and Giant runes.
localizations.answer_hint_11: You equip Odin's spear (22) and hurl it at Loki (11). 22 + 11 = 33
localizations.answer_hint_64: Flip your weapons to their back side, and place them so they line up with the picture on the battlefield (64). Follow the arrows on the tokens, starting with the ax, to form the letter N.
localizations.answer_hint_65: Once your weapons have been flipped face down and placed correctly onto the battlefield (65), you can trace the letter N.
localizations.answer_hint_74: You hurl Odin's spear (22) at the red rider, who the sunstone (47) reveals to be Surt (+23). 22 + 23 = 45
localizations.answer_hint_45: Yggdrasil, Loki's helmet, and Surt's shield conceal the runes for Wood, Destiny, and Fortune. Combine these with the Death rune to destroy the Bifrost.
localizations.answer_hint_55: Each location indicated along the first Viking's route is a dot you must connect using the map.
localizations.answer_hint_87: Take all the cards from the discard pile which depict the Silver Serpent (representing the molted skin) and place them on the map. Connect the five knots found on the cards in ascending numerical order to trace the first rune.
localizations.answer_hint_59: You must retrieve from the discard pile the cards depicting parts of the Gold Serpent on their backs, and place them on the matching parts of the map. The green forest forms the third rune you must trace.  From the starting point, go down 4 spaces, then go diagonally upward to the right, then diagonally upward to the left, diagonally upward to the right again, and finally upward and to the left once more.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_72: You realize you must have drowned during your attempt to swim to shore using machine 68. As such, you must tell Hel that you are dead.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_55_part1: Follow the same movements as the first Viking. From his starting point, go 1 space upward and to the left, then go down 3 spaces, return upward 2 spaces, and finally go 1 space diagonally downward and to the right.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_55_part2: After retrieving cards 30 and 40, you must retrieve from the discard pile the cards depicting parts of the Silver Serpet on their backs, and place them on the matching parts of the map. Then connect the knots found on the Silver Serpent starting from card 1 up to card 5 to trace the rune.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_55_part3: You must retrieve from the discard pile the cards depicting parts of the Gold Serpent on their backs, and place them on the matching parts of the map. The green forest forms the third rune you must trace.  From the starting point, go down 4 spaces, then go diagonally upward to the right, then diagonally upward to the left, diagonally upward to the right again, and finally upward and to the left once more.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_55_part4: Take card L, O, K, and I from the deck and flip them over. Piece them together to form a constellation in order to obtain the final rune to trace.
localizations.machine_55: You finally trace Raido, the rune of the mother, Freyja. The fourth rune takes shape and joins the others. With the ritual complete, the world around you shakes, blurs, disappears… and then revives again.  You have succeeded in giving this land a renewed hope for a fresh start. Congratulations!
localizations.machine_68: After hours of struggling, you sink below the waves, exhausted. When you regain conscousness, you find yourself on the shore of a strange island.
localizations.machine_72: The black mist around you dissipates. Hel vanishes, laughing as she says "Lif, now it is time for you to lay down your weaspons." You wake up lying on a worn wood floor. Was it all just a dream?
localizations.event_dead: Suddenly, your torch goes out, and you feel an icy presence swirling around you, gripping your frozen heart.
localizations.event_rune_1: Thanks to the guidance of the sunstone, you find your way through the mist. But as night begins to fall, you hear the reverberations of something large impacting your ship: A sea monster is attacking!
localizations.event_rune_2: Thanks to the power of the runic ritual, you manage to light a fire and make a torch.
localizations.event_rune_3: As you complete the ritual of forging, an object materializes before your eyes!
localizations.event_rune_3_almost: No; the order in which you activate the runes is unimportant. What matters is the number of sounds within each group.
localizations.event_rune_4: Once again, the runes show you the way.
localizations.event_rune_5: The illusory landscape around you seems to melt away.
localizations.event_rune_6: This time, you don't fall for Loki's trick!
localizations.event_rune_6_almost: That's too obvious. Loki sneers at you while admiring himself in his knife's reflection.
localizations.event_rune_7: The Bifrost bridge is collapsing! But Odin is dying from his wounds; this is the end of Asgard. But perhaps the father of the gods, in his great wisdom, has given you the means with which to start it all over again!
localizations.event_card_87: You trace Ansuz, the rune of Odin, the father.
localizations.event_card_59: You trace Dagaz, the rune of day (or rune of the Day).
localizations.event_card_42: You trace Berkana, the rune of fresh starts.
localizations.event_card_64: Freed from Loki's illusions, you easily find your way to Odin's hall. But as you approach, the sounds of an awful battle reach you.
